    T

    testCreateQuestion() - Static method in class StudentPostTests.StudentPostTests
    tests REQ01 students can post a question - makes a Question type post
    testDefaultGeneralThread() - Static method in class StudentPostTests.StudentPostTests
    tests REQ10 if no thread is specified a post defaults to the General thread the title "General" is what the DB uses for the default thread
    testDeleteReply() - Static method in class StudentPostTests.StudentPostTests
    tests REQ13 students can delete their own reply - simulates removing from list
    testFilterMyPosts() - Static method in class StudentPostTests.StudentPostTests
    tests REQ06 students can filter to see only their own posts
    testFilterUnread() - Static method in class StudentPostTests.StudentPostTests
    tests REQ07 students can filter to see only unread posts simulates this by tracking which posts a user has read
    testIsValidAuthorEmpty() - Static method in class StudentPostTests.StudentPostTests
    tests REQ24 - empty string should be invalid
    testIsValidAuthorNull() - Static method in class StudentPostTests.StudentPostTests
    tests REQ23 - null should be invalid
    testIsValidTitleEmpty() - Static method in class StudentPostTests.StudentPostTests
    tests REQ19 - empty string should be invalid
    testIsValidTitleNull() - Static method in class StudentPostTests.StudentPostTests
    tests REQ18 - null should be invalid
    testIsValidTitleValid() - Static method in class StudentPostTests.StudentPostTests
    tests REQ20 - normal text should be valid
    testIsValidTopicEmpty() - Static method in class StudentPostTests.StudentPostTests
    tests REQ22 - empty string should be invalid
    testIsValidTopicNull() - Static method in class StudentPostTests.StudentPostTests
    tests REQ21 - null should be invalid
    testIsValidTypeDiscussion() - Static method in class StudentPostTests.StudentPostTests
    tests REQ25 - Discussion should be valid
    testIsValidTypeQuestion() - Static method in class StudentPostTests.StudentPostTests
    tests REQ26 - Question should be valid
    testKeywordInTitle() - Static method in class StudentPostTests.StudentPostTests
    tests REQ08 students can search posts by keyword in the title
    testKeywordInTopic() - Static method in class StudentPostTests.StudentPostTests
    tests REQ09 students can search posts by keyword in the body/topic
    testNestedReply() - Static method in class StudentPostTests.StudentPostTests
    tests REQ12 students can reply to another reply - parentId points to the parent reply
    testPostGetters() - Static method in class StudentPostTests.StudentPostTests
    tests REQ04 all five getters return the right values
    testPostStoresId() - Static method in class StudentPostTests.StudentPostTests
    tests REQ03 post stores its ID correctly
    testPostStoresType() - Static method in class StudentPostTests.StudentPostTests
    tests REQ02 post stores its type correctly
    testReadAllPosts() - Static method in class StudentPostTests.StudentPostTests
    tests REQ05 students can see a list of all posts - simulates loading all posts
    testReplyToThread() - Static method in class StudentPostTests.StudentPostTests
    tests REQ11 students can reply to a thread - parentId 0 means direct reply to thread
    testSoftDeleteWithChildren() - Static method in class StudentPostTests.StudentPostTests
    tests REQ14 if a deleted reply has children it shows sentinel text instead of being removed this is what the DB does when softDeleteReply() is called
    testUpdatePostTitle() - Static method in class StudentPostTests.StudentPostTests
    tests REQ16 students can edit the title of their own post
    testUpdatePostTopic() - Static method in class StudentPostTests.StudentPostTests
    tests REQ17 students can edit the body/topic of their own post
    testUpdateReplyContent() - Static method in class StudentPostTests.StudentPostTests
    tests REQ15 students can update the content of their own reply
